zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Saye I於大約1135年出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親Guillaume de SAY30歲，母親Lady Beatrice de Mandeville32歲。他於1180年與Alice de Cheyne在英國肯特韋斯特 馬林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年5月19日在英國英格蘭肯特韋斯特 格林維其享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特多福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Saye I于大约1135年出生在英国英格兰艾可时，他的父亲Guillaume de SAY30岁，母亲Lady Beatrice de Mandeville32岁。他于1180年与Alice de Cheyne在英国肯特韋斯特 馬林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年5月19日在英国英格兰肯特韋斯特 格林維其享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特多福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Saye I was born about 1135, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Guillaume de SAY, was 30 and his mother, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, was 32. He married Alice de Cheyne in 1180, in West Malling, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 19 May 1214, in West Greenwich, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Saye I est né environ 1135, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Guillaume de SAY, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Cheyne en 1180, à West Malling, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1214, à West Greenwich, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.West Greenwich, Kent, England: West Greenwich, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Saye I um 1135 in Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de SAY 30 und seine Mutter Lady Beatrice de Mandeville 32. Er hat 1180 in West Malling, Kent, England Alice de Cheyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1214 im Alter von 80 Jahren in West Greenwich, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Saye I è nato il circa 1135 nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Guillaume de SAY, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Cheyne nel 1180, nel West Malling, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 maggio 1214, nel West Greenwich, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Dover, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Saye Iが約1135年にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de SAYは30歳，母Lady Beatrice de Mandevilleは32歳であった。1180年にイギリスケントウエスト マリングでAlice de Cheyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年5月19日にイギリスイギリスケントウエスト グレエンウィチで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントドバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Saye I(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de SAY(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Beatrice de Mandeville(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1180년 영국 켄트 웨스트 맬링에서 Alice de Cheyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 웨스트 그린위치에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 도버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Saye I nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Guillaume de SAY, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Cheyne em 1180, em West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1214, em West Greenwich, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Saye I родился около 1135 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Guillaume de SAY было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Beatrice de Mandeville, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Cheyne в 1180 г. в местности вест маллинг, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 19 мая 1214 г. в местности вест гринвич, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности довир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice de Cheyne en 1180, en West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1214, en West Greenwich, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
